reviews.comment:
La mejor estación de servicio de Mendoza

(Translated by Google)
The best gas station in Mendoza
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eC1TdUJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de sus empleados, hay baño y la cafetería en horas de la noche cerrada, no se si es por época de pandemia y tiene tal vez sus horarios de apertura, es el único detalle no tan bueno, lo demás excelente

(Translated by Google)
Very good service from its employees, there is a bathroom and the cafeteria is closed at night, I don't know if it is due to the pandemic and perhaps it has its opening hours, it is the only detail that is not so good, the rest is excellent
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5cU1IUkhnEAE
